descriptionInUI: Shows each pilot a short on-screen card -- campaign, mission number, date, mission time, callsign, aircraft, task, and departure field -- when they slot into an aircraft (S_EVENT_BIRTH), the way the professional DCS campaigns greet you at mission start, then flashes a SECOND card with the startup/taxi instruction (e.g. 'Contact ground @ 249.50 when ready to taxi'). A short beep plays as each card flashes (toggle below). Fires at mission start in single-player and whenever a pilot slots in / rejoins on a server. Inert unless the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.briefing (the 'Mission-start briefing popup' setting is on and the mission has a player-crewed flight). Display only -- no gameplay change. Card duration, startup grace, the ground frequency, and the beep toggle are options below.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Seconds each card stays on screen
Startup grace before the mission-start sweep (s)
Delay after slot-in before the first card + beep (s)
Ground frequency shown on the taxi card
Play a beep as each card flashes
